## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes on at least one Minecraft version/loader.
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew build` and all targets compile.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## Unreleased` or the current version section.
- [ ] If adding or changing item config fields, I updated `ITEM_CONFIG_DOCS.md`.
- [ ] If adding or changing abilities, I updated the docs and examples.
- [ ] I verified FIW Bosses `toolId` integration still works or is unaffected.
